description: Curated ASR benchmark export. Includes curated metadata and final reference transcripts only; excludes audio/video, model files, candidates, drafts, and intermediate results.
source_manifest: data/testset_manifest.v1.json (private/internal, not included in public repo)

case_weighting.note: Formal benchmark uses strict benchmark by default. benchmark includes user_confirmed_real_audio and auto_screened_public_subtitle references. User-confirmed cases receive the highest confidence multiplier; auto-screened public-subtitle cases are formal benchmark but weighted lower. Backup ready references and other cases remain available for audits or stress checks but are not mixed into formal scoring unless --scope ready/all is explicitly selected.

hotword_evaluation.new_case_requirement: Every newly added case must review hotwords and include a hotwords field; use [] when no useful hotwords exist.
hotword_evaluation.qwen3_asr_note: For local Qwen3-ASR MLX, hotwords are passed as prompt context terms through system_prompt/context injection, not as native weighted hotword decoding.
hotword_evaluation.native_hotword_note: Use native_hotwords only for engines that expose a real hotword vocabulary/biasing mechanism such as FunASR/Paraformer vocabulary_id.
hotword_evaluation.note: Run zero_shot, with_context_terms, and native_hotwords as separate tracks; do not mix them in one leaderboard.

long_form_evaluation.note: Long-form cases are tracked separately from short benchmark cases. The formal long-form quality leaderboard must use real long audio downloaded from Bilibili, YouTube, or public podcasts with subtitle/transcript-derived references and a full Qwen3-ASR 1.7B 4bit VAD-chunked backtest. Current formal target tiers are 1h/2h/4h; the 1h tier should cover zh/ja/en, while 2h/4h initially require one Chinese case each. Composed stress cases may concatenate existing benchmark audio and references to hit engineering stress durations such as 1h/2h/4h/8h, but they are engineering stress cases only and must not be used as real long-audio recognition-rate conclusions.

formal_leaderboard_scope.backup_ready_definition: reference.status == "ready" but review_level is not a benchmark review level; available for engineering checks or future promotion, not formal scoring by default
formal_leaderboard_scope.candidate_definition: reference.status in {"needs_reference", "deferred"}; not used for scoring until reviewed or strict-auto-screened
formal_leaderboard_scope.stress_definition: case_type == "composed_benchmark_stress" or scenario == "long_form_stress"; used for pipeline stability, not recognition quality leaderboard
formal_leaderboard_scope.note: Formal ASR quality comparisons must use strict benchmark by default. benchmark may be user-confirmed or strict-auto-screened public-subtitle audio; backup/candidate/stress cases must not be mixed into the formal leaderboard unless explicitly requested and labeled.
formal_leaderboard_scope.auto_screened_benchmark_definition: reference.status == "ready" and reference.review_level == "auto_screened_public_subtitle" after strict automatic subtitle/reference/audio/backtest screening
